title: Divide by 4
strategies: Halve the number, then halve again (÷4 = ÷2 ÷2).

pretest.stem: 16 wheels. Each car has 4 wheels. How many cars?

learn.title: Dividing by 4
learn.content: Split the total into 4 equal groups. 24 ÷ 4 = 6.

learn.title: Halve Twice
learn.content: To divide by 4: halve, then halve again. 20 ÷ 4: 20 ÷ 2 = 10, then 10 ÷ 2 = 5.

hints: Think about what divide by 4 means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is B. Remember how divide by 4 works.
